Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ragahn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Ragahn is a member of the Fisher sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is the First Fisher and leader of the Fisher sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn uses a Fisher's hook made of rust-patched iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is the First Fisher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is a Fisher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Ragahn is a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Ragahn is a Fisher who reached the Truegold stage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
